install_commands: apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends msmtp msmtp-mta ca-certificates && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
auth_script:
cat > ~/.msmtprc <<EOF
account default
host $SMTP_HOST
port $SMTP_PORT
auth on
user $SMTP_USER
password $SMTP_PASSWORD
tls on
tls_starttls on
from $SMTP_FROM
EOF
chmod 600 ~/.msmtprc

env_vars.description: SMTP server port. Use 587 for STARTTLS (recommended).
